epigraph.quote: Beautiful tapestry kneelers, from all local organisations – darts team, play groups.

moments.quote: It's a beautiful spot. High tide almost reaches us. Lovely sunset, misty sunrise.
past badgers' setts, for a super supper.

images.caption: St. Peter on the Wall, Bradwell on Sea 654

moments.quote: We took Kiri + Gigi to Bear + Wolf Cafe. Playground. Watched foot ball.
